$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Engagement Object schema, change-log, lifecycle, and termination-cascade rules. Submitted via POST /v1/engagements and countersigned via POST /v1/engagements/{id}/countersign. hiring_operator_signature is required at creation. deploying_principal_signature is required for the proposed→active transition and for all non-proposed states. Both top-level signatures are computed over the immutable engagement agreement fields only: engagement_id, title, hiring_operator, deploying_principal, created_at, and expires_at. Mutable state is authenticated by signed append-only change_log entries — the Registry MUST reject any modification of existing entries.
title: AIP Engagement Object
description: A mutable Registry resource modelling a multi-party engagement. Parent container for Capability Overlays scoped via engagement_id, Approval Envelopes scoped via engagement_id, and participant roster and approval gate state.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this engagement. Format: 'eng:' prefix followed by a UUID v4 in canonical lowercase hyphenated form. Immutable once created.

hiring_operator.description: DID of the hiring operator — the party that initiates and manages the engagement. MUST use did:web or did:aip method.

deploying_principal.description: DID of the deploying principal — the human or organisation authorising the agents in this engagement.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the engagement was created.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which the engagement expires if not already completed or terminated. MUST be strictly after created_at.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the engagement. Transitions: proposed→active (requires countersignature via POST /v1/engagements/{id}/countersign), active→suspended (hiring operator), active→completed (hiring operator), active/suspended→terminated (either party).

participants.description: Array of Participant objects representing agents enrolled in this engagement.

approval_gates.description: OPTIONAL. Array of Approval Gate objects that must be satisfied before certain actions in this engagement.

change_log.description: Append-only array of Change Log Entry objects recording all mutations to this engagement. The Registry MUST reject any request that modifies or deletes an existing entry. Every accepted Engagement Object mutation appends exactly one new entry whose seq is previous version + 1.

hiring_operator_signature.description: Base64url-encoded EdDSA signature by the hiring_operator over the immutable engagement agreement fields only: engagement_id, title, hiring_operator, deploying_principal, created_at, and expires_at. Required when the Engagement Object is created.

hiring_operator_kid.description: DID URL identifying the Ed25519 verification method used to verify hiring_operator_signature. The DID portion MUST equal hiring_operator.

deploying_principal_signature.description: Base64url-encoded EdDSA countersignature by the deploying_principal over the same immutable engagement agreement fields used for hiring_operator_signature. Added through POST /v1/engagements/{id}/countersign. Required for the proposed→active transition and for all non-proposed states. Together with hiring_operator_signature completes the bi-lateral agreement.

deploying_principal_kid.description: DID URL identifying the Ed25519 verification method used to verify deploying_principal_signature. The DID portion MUST equal deploying_principal. Required whenever deploying_principal_signature is present.

version.description: Current change-log sequence number. MUST equal max(change_log[*].seq). Creation starts at version 1 with engagement_created seq 1. Each accepted mutation appends exactly one change_log entry and sets version to that entry's seq atomically.

participant.title: Participant
participant.description: An agent enrolled as a participant in this engagement.

role.description: Human-readable role label for this participant within the engagement (e.g., 'orchestrator', 'payment-processor', 'reviewer').

capability_overlay_id.description: OPTIONAL. Capability Overlay applying to this participant within this engagement.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this participant was enrolled.

added_by.description: DID of the party that added this participant.

removed_at.description: OPTIONAL. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this participant was removed. Absent for active participants.

approval_gate.title: Approval Gate
approval_gate.description: A named checkpoint within the engagement requiring explicit approval before dependent steps may proceed.

gate_id.description: Unique gate identifier within this engagement.

name.description: Human-readable name for this approval gate.

required_approver.description: DID of the party whose approval is required to pass this gate.

trigger.description: Machine-evaluable trigger condition. scope:<scope-string> guards any operation whose requested aip_scope set contains that scope. action_type:<action-type> guards Approval Envelope steps whose action_type exactly equals that value.

status.description: Current approval status of this gate. pending: awaiting approval. approved: gate passed. rejected: gate failed — dependent steps MUST NOT proceed.

approved_at.description: OPTIONAL. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the gate was approved.

change_log_entry.title: Change Log Entry
change_log_entry.description: An immutable record of one change to the engagement. The Registry appends entries; existing entries MUST NOT be modified or deleted.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number starting at 1. Each new entry MUST be exactly previous Engagement Object version + 1, and the stored Engagement Object version MUST be set to this seq.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this change occurred.

action.description: The type of change recorded in this log entry.

actor.description: DID of the party that performed this change.

actor_kid.description: DID URL identifying the Ed25519 verification method used to verify this entry's signature. The DID portion MUST equal actor.

payload.description: OPTIONAL. Action-specific data. For participant_added: {aid, role}. For participant_removed: {aid}. For gate_approved/rejected: {gate_id}.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded EdDSA signature by the actor over the JCS-canonical (RFC 8785) change log entry excluding the signature field.
